Batey Brophy & O'Dea PLLC
About Practice Areas Attorneys Reviews Contact

Practice Areas

At Batey Brophy & O’Dea, we focus on a limited number of practice areas so we can do them well. We are not a volume firm – we take the cases we believe in and give them everything we have.

Car Accidents

If you were hurt in a car accident in Louisville or anywhere in Kentucky, we can help. We know how insurance companies work, we know the tactics they use, and we know how to push back. Free consultation.

Learn More

Slip and Fall

Property owners have a legal duty to keep their premises safe. If someone else's negligence caused your injury, you may have a claim. We handle premises liability cases throughout Louisville and Jefferson County.

Learn More

Personal Injury

Car accidents, slip and falls, dog bites, and other injury claims. If you got hurt because someone else was not careful enough, call us for a free consultation.

Social Security Disability

Navigating the Social Security disability application and appeals process is complicated. We help clients fight for the benefits they have earned.

Probate

Estate administration, will contests, and probate matters. Guiding families through difficult transitions with practical, straightforward legal guidance.

Family Law

Divorce, custody, child support, and other family matters handled with sensitivity and determination. We try to make a difficult process as manageable as possible.

Free Consultation

If you have been injured or need legal help, call us today at 502-509-9407 or contact us online for a free consultation.
